seoTitle: Allendale North vs Alma — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Allendale North and Alma. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Allendale North vs Alma: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Allendale North and Alma.
heading: Allendale North vs Alma — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Allendale North, South Australia and Alma, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Allendale North has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Alma (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Allendale North or Alma safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Allendale North has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Alma scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Allendale North scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Alma scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Allendale North or Alma?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Allendale North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
